title: Grilled Beef Satay
description: Satay is a popular Malaysian dish of marinated meat grilled on skewers. This recipe features tender beef and a blend of spices.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine coconut milk, lemongrass, galangal, coriander powder, cumin powder, salt, and black pepper. Blend until smooth.
Add the beef strips to the blender and blend until the meat is well coated with the marinade.
Thread the beef strips onto the wooden skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Heat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the satay for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the meat is cooked through.
Serve the satay hot with a side of peanut sauce, if desired.
Let the satay rest for 2-3 minutes before serving.
